input_concatenated_text:
As Starbucks go this one is pretty small, and although the staff is very nice here, the lines are often too long and frankly, it's just a Starbucks and there are other choices not far away. the parking lot is very small and the drive thru makes the entire retail experience a bad one.

There are many Starbucks choices in he area, but what makes the experience worth it is the staff. They treat you like family.
summary: Customers appreciate the friendly staff at this Starbucks, noting that they create a welcoming atmosphere. However, many express frustration with the small size of the location, long lines, and limited parking, which detracts from the overall experience.

input_concatenated_text:
Soooo bad. Don't waste your money. I wanted a margarita and the waitress told me they were out of marg mix so I asked for a tequila soda with lime instead and another waitress came up to me and told me they don't have a liquor license and they make their margs with wine (??) super weird and confusing. Then the original waitress came up and gave me a tequila with still water and one dry lime. Sooo gross. We ordered the shrimp tacos and didn't finish them because they were so flavorless not even the salsa had any flavor. Don't waist your time here.

I went there for lunch or that I have a buddy mine took me and I had the number 12 or whatever it is called Hanger 12 very good service was impeccable everything out of the drinks everything is Jarvis the food was in the food was outstanding I would go that I would go back there again and again
summary: Customer opinions are highly polarized, with one reviewer expressing strong dissatisfaction due to poor drink options and flavorless food, while another praises the excellent service and outstanding food quality. Overall, experiences seem to vary significantly, suggesting inconsistency in service and menu offerings.

input_concatenated_text:
I have lived down the street from the diner for 6 years.  The owner is always there with his hair all over the place and looking like he just woke up.  I stopped going when 3 times in a row I got bad food.  The first was ham with my breakfast that was bad and tasted Like sour milk.  The site of the owner simply made us not want to come back and he never had a smile on his face.

This is where I usually go when my dad comes to town :-) he loves this type of food and atmosphere. I actually visited by myself a few days ago when I was craving breakfast items. I don't think I've ever had a bad meal there. The variety is amazing and the prices are extremely reasonable. The food is always fast hot and tasty.
summary: Customer opinions about the diner are mixed; one reviewer expresses dissatisfaction with the food quality and the owner's appearance, leading to a decision to stop visiting. In contrast, another customer enjoys the diner for its great food, variety, and reasonable prices, highlighting a consistently positive experience.
